tasks.title: Environment Variable Validation (Startup Guard)
tasks.description: Implement a strict startup check that validates .env variables (GEMINI_API_KEY, PORT). Crash early if missing.

tasks.title: Persistent Rate Limiting
tasks.description: Move rate limit store from memory to Disk (better for production restarts).

tasks.title: Graceful Shutdown Handler
tasks.description: Implement SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers in server.js to close connections and flush logs properly.

tasks.title: Persistent File Logging (Winston)
tasks.description: Replace console.log with Winston logger + rotating file appender in /logs directory.

tasks.title: Automated Core Testing (Jest)
tasks.description: Initialize a test suite for getContextData and API health endpoints to prevent regressions.

tasks.title: API Documentation (Swagger/OpenAPI)
tasks.description: Generate or document the /api/v1 contract for ecosystem integrations.

tasks.title: Frontend Assets Build Pipeline
tasks.description: Add simple minification for app.js and styles.css before serving in production mode.

tasks.title: Deployment Post-Check (Health Probe)
tasks.description: Update Deploy-VPS.ps1 to verify /health after service restart.

tasks.title: Dependency Security Audit
tasks.description: Perform npm audit fix and update vulnerable middleware packages.

tasks.title: SSoT Sync Enforcement
tasks.description: Implement a 'Stale Metadata' warning if the last vcms-scan was more than 24h ago.
